title: nasturtium × stenophyllum
intro: Nasturtium × stenophyllum, also known as Indian cress or garden cress, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between Nasturtium microphyllum and Nasturtium officinale. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Nasturtium × stenophyllum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or mixing them with a solvent like ethanol.
